programme.title: Talaash: The Hunt Begins¡¦
programme.desc: Young Arjun¡¯s father gets killed by mafia and they also take away his younger sister. Afterwards, his mother also goes insane. Vowing revenge, Arjun grows up to be a high-profile vigilante for police and sets out on a mission to find his sister.

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend¡¯s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Time for Awakening
programme.desc: For wild animals in Central Europe, early springtime is time to gain energy and produce offspring.

programme.title: Autumn and Winter
programme.desc: The traditional mixed orchard is a crucially important cultivated landscape, especially in fall and winter.

programme.title: Spring and Summer
programme.desc: In spring and summer, the orchard meadow reveals an invaluable habitat for the local flora and fauna.

programme.title: The Magic Wishing Table
programme.desc: This episode sets off on a tour in the winter wilderness of Central Europe to see how local animals survive.

programme.title: Animal Survival Experts
programme.desc: This episode embarks on an exciting journey of discovery through the winter wilderness of Central Europe.

programme.title: The Tuatara
programme.desc: How did the tuatara survive while most dinosaurs went extinct?

programme.title: The Kiwi
programme.desc: Take a look at the clues that help to explain the kiwi's history and why it evolved into such an odd bird.

programme.title: Extreme Survivors
programme.desc: Wildlife must adapt to New Zealand's changing landscape. Local fauna have evolved in an unstable environment.

programme.title: A Very Strange Parrot
programme.desc: Most parrots are colorful and fly in noisy flocks, but New Zealand's kakapo breaks all the rules.

programme.title: Island Giants
programme.desc: Many of New Zealand's native animals share an unusual trait they're living giants. Researchers find out why.

programme.title: Bella Vista
programme.desc: A film about place and belonging.

programme.title: DOMESTIC
programme.desc: Domestic is a story about people who eat the animals they love and animals who love people unconditionally. A rabbit, a hen, a cat, a dog and a dove pass through the lives of the main characters and influence their evolution.

programme.title: A Farewell to Arms
programme.desc: An American ambulance driver and an English nurse fall in love in Italy during World War I.

programme.title: A Propos De Nice
programme.desc: What starts off as a conventional travelogue turns into a satirical portrait of the town of Nice on the French Cote d'Azur, especially its wealthy inhabitants.

programme.title: Born To Be Wild (AKA Pride of the West)
programme.desc: A greedy land baron has shut down the dam that supplies water to the town of Indian Head. Two truck drivers race to get a truck loaded with dynamite to the dam so they can blow it, but must battle their way through a gang of armed thugs hired by the land baron to stop them.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Chuck Scott gets a job as chauffeur to tough guy Eddie Roman but Chuck's involvement with Eddie's fearful wife becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: The Fixies

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Perast is an old town on the Bay of Kotor in Montenegro. It is situated a few kilometres northwest of Kotor and is noted for its proximity to the islets of St. George and Our Lady of the Rocks.The city was founded by the Illyrians, named after one of the "&"local tribes—Pirusti.Perast lies beneath the hill of St. Ilija (873 m), on a cape that separates the Bay of Risano from that of Kotor, and overlooks the Verige strait, the narrowest part of the Bay of Kotor.

programme.title: Orhei Vechi Monastery Moldova
programme.desc: Old Orhei is a Moldovan historical and archaeological complex located in Trebujeni, which is approximately 60 kilometres (37 mi) north-east of Chişinău on the Răut River in the Republic of Moldova. The ancient city of Orheiul Vechi is a natural and histo"&"rical complex, located in a narrow bend of the Raut River. The natural landscape of limestone rock, eroded by the river, is combined with archaeological vestiges of the ancient Trypillian civilization. The Orthodox monastery is still inhabited by a handfu"&"l of Orthodox monks, who maintain the church at the top of the hill. The caves are still functional as chapels. The caves contain an array of historical artifacts.

The ancient city of Orheiul Vechi is a natural and histo"&"rical complex, located in a narrow bend of the Raut River. The natural landscape of limestone rock, eroded by the river, is combined with archaeological vestiges of the ancient Trypillian civilization. The Orthodox monastery is still inhabited by a handfu"&"l of Orthodox monks, who maintain the church at the top of the hill. The caves are still functional as chapels. The caves contain an array of historical artifacts.

Voronezh Town, Russia
programme.desc: In the southern part of Russia, by the river Voronezh, there is a city with the same name. It has a long history of remarkable men and women who prospered and fell here. The city fought for freedom countless times and brought a lot of talented artists to "&"the world. It is a city of strong people and fantastic architecture. Voronezh was founded in 1585 when tsar Fyodor ordered to start the building of a new fortress on the Voronezh-river's bank to create a barrier from southern invasions. The fortress was f"&"inished around 1586 and defended Russians only for four years before it was burnt to the ground by cossacks.

programme.title: Orgosolo Old Town Sardinia Italy
programme.desc: Situated in the middle of the Mediterranean Sea, Sardinia is an autonomous region in southwestern Italy, with a vast history and a charming natural environment. Unaffected by human settlement, its small villages and ancient cities still preserve their nat"&"ural composition. Orgosolo is one of them. It sits in a valley at the center of the rugged Supramonte mountains range, surrounded by a fascinating and charming natural landscape dominated by wild and unpolluted nature. The small village's territory is cha"&"racterized by an unparalleled environmental richness with uncontaminated woods, Mediterranean scrub, widespread endemics, and a varied fauna ranging from birds to reptiles.

programme.title: Antalya, Turkey
programme.desc: When King Attalos first set eyes on Antalya he called it “Paradise on Earth”. Its fertile soil and natural harbour made it favourable for settlers throughout the ages. Therefore Antalya has a rich cultural heritage with many remains of an outstanding hist"&"ory. The Persians, Alexander the Great, the Romans, the Arabs and many more have left their mark on the area over the centuries but no one more than King Attalos of Pergamon who in 159 B.C. gave the region its name Attaleia, which leaded to the modern nam"&"e Antalya....
